name: Mold | IAQ Inspector
description: Certified mold inspections and indoor air quality testing serving Bergen, Union, Passaic, Hudson, Essex, and Morris Counties in NJ and NY, operating since 2011.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: He is literally one of the most honest contractors I have ever done business with.
A true professional! Look no further for a knowledgeable, thoughtful, detail-oriented specialist.
He did not upsell and the prices were very reasonable.

sentiment.summary: Mold | IAQ Inspector (Henry) has an exceptionally positive reputation with customers consistently praising his thoroughness, professionalism, honesty, knowledge, and reasonable pricing across multiple NJ locations.
